\tzpentry{ID3316}{Kaluza-Klein Pi Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3316 introduces Kaluza-Klein Pi Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} f_n = \frac{nc}{2 \pi R_ \text{KK}} \sim n \times 50 \text{ GHz} \end{equation}
